channel.title: IT Career Path on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in IT Career Path on simeononsecurity

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook: From Help Desk to IT Director
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology" , "career playbook" , "IT certifications" , "technology jobs" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salaries, and team leadership.

item.title: What Does an IT Career Path Look Like? From Entry Level to IT Director
item.category: "IT career path" , "IT career progression" , "IT career levels" , "help desk to sysadmin" , "sysadmin to cloud engineer" , "IT career timeline" , "IT career ladder" , "IT career stages" , "information technology career path"
item.description: A realistic look at how IT careers progress — the typical roles, timelines, and decision points from help desk to systems administrator to engineer to IT management.

item.title: Getting Started in Information Technology
item.category: "IT career" , "getting started in IT" , "IT beginner" , "IT career path" , "IT specializations" , "home lab" , "IT training" , "entry level IT"
item.description: Everything you need to know to begin an IT career — from understanding the field to building your first home lab and choosing a specialization.

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology career" , "IT certifications" , "CompTIA A+" , "CompTIA Network+" , "systems administration" , "cloud computing" , "DevOps" , "help desk" , "IT job search" , "IT salary" , "IT management" , "IT career path" , "IT training" , "IT skills"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salary expectations, and team leadership.
